title: Spot-nik Workflow app users
excerpt:
Hi, 
Has anyone used workflow app by Spot-nik. They’re the ones with Super Form app as well. I’m wondering if workflow can be used with multiple approvers. Wanted to check if anyone has used it. 
Thank you.
Ameya

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
